subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-'Alí! Upon thee be the peace of God and His loving-kindness! Say: All praise be unto Thee, O my God and God of all names [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل علی علیک سلام الله و عنایته قل لک الحمد یا الهی و اله الاسماء و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
